nasb.text: “Again, the kingdom of heaven is like a dragnet cast into the sea, and gathering fish of every kind;

esv.text: “Again, the kingdom of heaven is     like a net that was thrown into the sea and     gathered fish of every kind.

cnv.text: “天國又好像一個網，撒在海裡，網到各樣的魚。

ccb.text: “天国就像一张渔网，撒在海里捕到了各种鱼。

csbs.text: “天国又好比一张渔网撒在海里，网到了各种鱼类。
